lore.english:
Taimanin. While fighting on the field, she is also an instructor at Gosha Academy. She is strict not only to others but also to herself, and is always confident and fair, earning respect from students. However, she uses her X-ray powers to look through student pranks and scolds them strictly, so some students are afraid of her.

She has ninja arts that can see through objects, and locates hidden enemies or their position and strikes them down with her whip as a weapon. Her aggressive battle methods are known throughout Taimanins and also in other organizations.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&ATK] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase ATK of All allies by 30% in Main Story
skills.description_readable: Increase ATK of All allies by 30% in Main Story

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taima Whip Style: Bleedout[-]
skills.description:
Cracks the whip, to attack the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1760102]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1760102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1760102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Cracks the whip, to attack the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with (10%) Bleed at a 15% chance.
Duration: 3 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taima Whip Style: Stinger[-]
skills.description:
Cracks the whip and then stabs the enemy with it 3 times.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1760202]%)[-] [&Weaken] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1760202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1760202] turn(s)
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], steals 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&Buff] from the target at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1760203]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Cracks the whip and then stabs the enemy with it 3 times.
Target hit is inflicted with (19.5%) Weaken at a 15% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)
If the target's HP is less than 50%, steals 1 Random Buff from the target at a 50% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Taima Whip Style: Round Up[-]
skills.description:
Whips [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] while spinning around.
Performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1760302]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DmgDrainHp]
Defeating an enemy with this skill resets the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] of [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_17603].
skills.description_readable:
Whips ALL enemies while spinning around.
Performs a (15%) Life Steal
Defeating an enemy with this skill resets the Cooldown of Taima Whip Style: Round Up.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_17601]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_17603]
skill_data.description:
Whips [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] while spinning around.
Removes [&Stealth] from [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter].
skill_data.description_readable:
Whips ALL enemies while spinning around.
Removes Stealth from ALL enemies after the attack.
